problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Combining Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
